## Meeting Purpose

[Impromptu discussion on business operations, potential collaboration, and industry trends between Marcel Santilli (growthx.ai) and Chris Kent.](https://fathom.video/share/pUWm35JfD_4zB85vzGyw_-4k8PxCGjbr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel proposed expanding their collaboration to include a newsletter and programmatic social content, with potential for a pricing catalog project](https://fathom.video/share/pUWm35JfD_4zB85vzGyw_-4k8PxCGjbr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Chris expressed interest in developing a newsletter and creating a catalog of AI companies' pricing models](https://fathom.video/share/pUWm35JfD_4zB85vzGyw_-4k8PxCGjbr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Both discussed the challenges and strategies of rapid growth in the AI-driven business landscape](https://fathom.video/share/pUWm35JfD_4zB85vzGyw_-4k8PxCGjbr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Agreement to kick off new projects after Chris's upcoming white paper launch (around August 25th, 2025)](https://fathom.video/share/pUWm35JfD_4zB85vzGyw_-4k8PxCGjbr?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

## Topics

### Current Business Challenges

  - [Marcel (72 employees, nearing $10M in contracts) described CEO role as "chief janitor," handling constant problem-solving](https://fathom.video/share/pUWm35JfD_4zB85vzGyw_-4k8PxCGjbr?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Chris facing challenges in building marketing/go-to-market while simultaneously creating pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/pUWm35JfD_4zB85vzGyw_-4k8PxCGjbr?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Both emphasized the importance of moving quickly in the AI space](https://fathom.video/share/pUWm35JfD_4zB85vzGyw_-4k8PxCGjbr?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)

### Newsletter and Content Strategy

  - [Marcel proposed creating a newsletter similar to one done for Augment Code (41% open rate, 10% click-through)](https://fathom.video/share/pUWm35JfD_4zB85vzGyw_-4k8PxCGjbr?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [Suggested using Beehive for distribution, allowing for subscriber growth and potential sponsorship opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/pUWm35JfD_4zB85vzGyw_-4k8PxCGjbr?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [Chris expressed interest, seeing newsletters as an untapped opportunity in their space](https://fathom.video/share/pUWm35JfD_4zB85vzGyw_-4k8PxCGjbr?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)

### AI Company Pricing Catalog

  - [Chris plans to create a catalog of \~100 AI companies, including pricing models and features](https://fathom.video/share/pUWm35JfD_4zB85vzGyw_-4k8PxCGjbr?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)
  - [Marcel shared examples of similar projects (e.g., for Ramp), demonstrating rapid development capabilities (2 weeks for comprehensive catalog)](https://fathom.video/share/pUWm35JfD_4zB85vzGyw_-4k8PxCGjbr?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [Discussed potential to start with 60 companies and expand, focusing on those with most available data](https://fathom.video/share/pUWm35JfD_4zB85vzGyw_-4k8PxCGjbr?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)

### Team Structure and Hiring

  - [Chris outlined his team: Megan (chief of staff), Chung (PMM), Maddie (revenue marketing), Alexa (starting as field lead)](https://fathom.video/share/pUWm35JfD_4zB85vzGyw_-4k8PxCGjbr?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
  - [Discussed open headcount for demand generation, but not prioritizing hiring immediately](https://fathom.video/share/pUWm35JfD_4zB85vzGyw_-4k8PxCGjbr?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)

### AI-Driven Sales Enablement

  - [Marcel described creating AI-powered artifacts for sales teams (e.g., for Auth0 and Okta)](https://fathom.video/share/pUWm35JfD_4zB85vzGyw_-4k8PxCGjbr?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
  - [Emphasized the value of AI in maintaining consistent messaging and accessing comprehensive customer information](https://fathom.video/share/pUWm35JfD_4zB85vzGyw_-4k8PxCGjbr?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to modify Statement of Work (SoW) with an effective date of August 25th, 2025](https://fathom.video/share/pUWm35JfD_4zB85vzGyw_-4k8PxCGjbr?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
  - [Chris to provide email subscriber count for newsletter planning](https://fathom.video/share/pUWm35JfD_4zB85vzGyw_-4k8PxCGjbr?tab=summary&timestamp=1579.0)
  - [Consider allocating budget for subscriber acquisition (\~$2 per subscriber)](https://fathom.video/share/pUWm35JfD_4zB85vzGyw_-4k8PxCGjbr?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [Schedule a proper dinner meeting during Chris's next visit to San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/pUWm35JfD_4zB85vzGyw_-4k8PxCGjbr?tab=summary&timestamp=1859.0)
  - [Kick off new projects (newsletter, social content, pricing catalog) after white paper launch](https://fathom.video/share/pUWm35JfD_4zB85vzGyw_-4k8PxCGjbr?tab=summary&timestamp=1807.0)
